name: Taiju Shiba | Violent Husband

Tall. Immense and incredible strength. Greater fighting prowess. Expertise in using violence. Great endurance. Charisma. Leadership. Intimidation. Wealth. Smoking cigarettes. Going to church on Christmas Eve.
